assumptions.rationale: Estimated from equipment types with 30% aisle overhead — industry baseline

assumptions.value: generic fallback for operations without DFMEA refs
assumptions.rationale: Operations OP20/OP90/OP100 have no DFMEA refs; control methods assigned from industry practice

input_materials.material: PA12 monolayer or multilayer, 8x6mm
PA12 monolayer or multilayer, 10x8mm (or rubber hose section)

process_steps.equipment: Single-screw extruder with calibration tank + haul-off
key_parameters: Melt temperature 220 +/- 5 degC
Line speed 12 m/min (8x6mm) / 10 m/min (10x8mm)
Vacuum calibration pressure -0.3 +/- 0.05 bar
Cooling water temperature 18 +/- 2 degC
OD tolerance +/- 0.1mm per drawing
Wall thickness 1.0mm min (eccentricity <= 10%)
process_steps.control_method: SPC on melt temperature and line speed; visual check per WI-EXT-001

input_materials.material: PA12 monolayer or multilayer, 8x6mm
PA12 monolayer or multilayer, 10x8mm (or rubber hose section)

process_steps.output: Cut tube segments (feed 8x6mm, return 10x8mm) at 600mm length
key_parameters: Cut length COMP-01: 600 +/- 10mm
Cut length COMP-02: 600 +/- 10mm
Cut quality: burr-free, no deformation > 0.2mm
Squareness: +/- 1 deg
process_steps.control_method: Cut length verification (100%); burr-free visual check

input_materials.material: PA12 monolayer or multilayer, 8x6mm
PA12 monolayer or multilayer, 10x8mm (or rubber hose section)

process_steps.output: Bent tube with 3-5 bends per routing geometry
key_parameters: Bend radius: >= 2.5x OD (min R20 for 8mm, R25 for 10mm)
Bend angle tolerance: +/- 0.5 deg
Springback compensation: auto per material database
Mandrel: flexible ball mandrel for PA12
Number of bends: 3-5 per tube (estimated, no 3D model)
Ovality at bend: <= 8% of nominal OD
process_steps.control_method: CNC program verification; bend angle measurement per setup sheet

input_materials.material: PA12 monolayer or multilayer, 8x6mm
PA12 monolayer or multilayer, 10x8mm (or rubber hose section)

process_steps.output: Tube with formed beads at both ends for QC attachment
process_steps.equipment: Hydraulic end-forming press with heated die
key_parameters: End-form type: bead (retention feature for QC connector)
Bead OD: per PF.90298 spigot spec
Forming temperature: 160 +/- 10 degC (PA12 softening)
Press force: 2.0 +/- 0.3 kN
Dimensional check: bead OD, concentricity, length
Both ends formed (2 operations per tube)
process_steps.control_method: Bead OD gauge check (100%); forming temperature SPC

input_materials.material: PA12 monolayer or multilayer, 8x6mm
PA12 monolayer or multilayer, 10x8mm (or rubber hose section)

input_materials.part_name: QC Female connector 90° — filter side (5/16 inch)
input_materials.material: PA66-GF or metallic, per PF.90298

input_materials.part_name: QC Female connector 90° — engine side (3/8 inch)
input_materials.material: Metallic with secondary latch, per PF.90298
FKM 'B' (fuel contact) + FVMQ (external), dual captured system per PF.90298

process_steps.output: Tube sub-assembly with QC connectors press-fit and latched
process_steps.equipment: Semi-automatic press station with force-displacement monitoring
key_parameters: O-ring installation: dual FKM + FVMQ per PF.90298
QC press-fit force: 50-67N max per PF.90298
Force-displacement curve monitoring (100%)
Audible click verification for QC latch engagement
Secondary latch engagement check (COMP-04)
COMP-03: 5/16 inch filter side; COMP-04: 3/8 inch engine side
process_steps.control_method: Force-displacement curve monitoring (100%); audible click verification

input_materials.material: PA12 monolayer or multilayer, 8x6mm
PA12 monolayer or multilayer, 10x8mm (or rubber hose section)
Supplier: Nobel Auto, working pressure 4.5 bar

process_steps.output: Fuel line sub-assembly with damper crimped between feed and return tubes
process_steps.equipment: Crimping station with force monitoring + fixture
key_parameters: Damper inlet press-fit to COMP-01 (feed tube)
Damper outlet press-fit to COMP-02 (return tube)
Crimp force monitoring: force-displacement curve (100%)
Interference fit spec per INTF-03 / INTF-04
Push-out force verification: >= 200N (sample basis)
Nobel Auto damper: incoming inspection per PPAP
process_steps.control_method: Crimp force monitoring (100%); push-out force sample check

input_materials.material: Braided sleeve Type B (CPN 5302) <Meihe>, per SP.91220/02 + PF.90271
Nylon, must match tube OD

process_steps.output: Complete assembly with anti-abrasion sleeve and clips installed
process_steps.equipment: Manual assembly station with fixture + torque tools
key_parameters: Sleeve (COMP-06) position: per routing drawing
Sleeve retention: visual check (position, no gaps)
Clip installation: 3 clips at designated points
Clip insertion force: <= 40N
Clip retention force: >= 100N (sample verification)
Assembly checklist: poka-yoke fixture ensures all clips present
process_steps.control_method: Poka-yoke fixture (all clips present); visual check per work instruction

input_materials.material: PA12 monolayer or multilayer, 8x6mm
PA12 monolayer or multilayer, 10x8mm (or rubber hose section)

input_materials.part_name: QC Female connector 90° — filter side (5/16 inch)
input_materials.material: PA66-GF or metallic, per PF.90298

input_materials.part_name: QC Female connector 90° — engine side (3/8 inch)
input_materials.material: Metallic with secondary latch, per PF.90298
Supplier: Nobel Auto, working pressure 4.5 bar
Braided sleeve Type B (CPN 5302) <Meihe>, per SP.91220/02 + PF.90271
Color different from component, removal force 2-15N
Nylon, must match tube OD
FKM 'B' (fuel contact) + FVMQ (external), dual captured system per PF.90298

process_steps.output: Leak-tested assembly (pressure decay verified at 6.75 bar)
process_steps.equipment: Automated leak test bench (pressure decay method)
key_parameters: Test pressure: 6.75 bar (1.5x WP of 4.5 bar)
Stabilization time: 10 sec
Measurement time: 20 sec
Max allowable decay: 10 Pa/sec (equivalent to 0.5 cc/min)
Test medium: dry air (Class 3 ISO 8573)
100% test — mandatory per DFMEA S=10 failure modes
Auto pass/fail with barcode traceability
process_steps.control_method: Automated pressure decay test (100%); data logging per part serial

input_materials.material: Metallic with secondary latch, per PF.90298
Supplier: Nobel Auto, working pressure 4.5 bar
Braided sleeve Type B (CPN 5302) <Meihe>, per SP.91220/02 + PF.90271
Color different from component, removal force 2-15N
Nylon, must match tube OD
FKM 'B' (fuel contact) + FVMQ (external), dual captured system per PF.90298

key_parameters: Flush volume: 200 mL calibration fluid per part
Filter mesh: 200 um (particle size per spec)
Max residue: per Stellantis cleanliness spec (typically <= 3 mg/m2)
Sample frequency: 100% during launch, then 1/shift SPC
Traceability: part serial number linked to test result
process_steps.control_method: Gravimetric residue measurement; SPC sampling after launch phase

input_materials.material: Metallic with secondary latch, per PF.90298
Supplier: Nobel Auto, working pressure 4.5 bar
Braided sleeve Type B (CPN 5302) <Meihe>, per SP.91220/02 + PF.90271

process_steps.output: Finished assembly with protection caps, labeled and packaged
key_parameters: Protection caps: both ends (2 pcs, color different from part)
Cap retention force: 2-15N per spec
Label: barcode with part number, serial, date, shift
Packaging: per Stellantis packaging instruction
Visual inspection: final cosmetic check before pack
process_steps.control_method: Visual final inspection; label barcode verification
